_schema.baseline: metric values at start (clicks/impr/ctr/pos over prior 7d)
_schema.review_after: date (>= 2 weeks after started; SEO changes need 2-4 weeks)
_schema.outcome: filled at review time; ALSO append the lesson to LEARNINGS.md

experiments.change: PLANNED: homepage title/meta rewrite targeting 'car detailing near me' CTR (currently pos 7.1, 189 impr/28d, 1.06% CTR)
experiments.hypothesis: Homepage is in striking distance (pos 7) for the highest-volume local term (880/mo); a benefit-led title (price anchor + 'We Come to You' + 5.0 stars) should lift CTR toward 3-5%

experiments.change: PLANNED: fix /blog/car-detailing-prices-value-breakdown/ - 2,011 impressions, 0 clicks, pos 45. Retitle to match actual queries, add price table near top, internal-link from /pricing
experiments.hypothesis: Page has huge impression volume with zero clicks; better title/meta + on-page price answers should convert impressions to clicks and lift position
target_queries: how much does car detailing cost

experiments.change: PLANNED: /pricing vs /pricing/ both receiving impressions (2,743 + 1,270 per 28d) - verify canonical + redirect so only trailing-slash version is indexed
experiments.hypothesis: Consolidating the split should merge ranking signals and lift the surviving URL's position
